---
title: "deseq"
format: html
editor: visual
---

libraries

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(tidyverse)
library(apeglm)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(pheatmap)
library(gridExtra)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(enrichplot)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(msigdbr)
```

```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/avgus/Desktop/Naujas aplankas/feature_counts")
```


genebody
```{r}

setwd("C:/Users/avgus/Desktop/Naujas aplankas/genebody")

library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)

pdf <- function(...) invisible(NULL)
dev.off <- function(...) invisible(NULL)

samples <- c("SRR11647686", "SRR11647689", "SRR11647692", 
             "SRR11647696", "SRR11647699", "SRR11647702")
colors <- c(
  "SRR11647686" = "#e89eb8",
  "SRR11647689" = "#332932",
  "SRR11647692" = "#bb9999",
  "SRR11647696" = "#bcbd22",
  "SRR11647699" = "#efb7b5",
  "SRR11647702" = "#6BAED6"
)


all_data <- data.frame()

for(s in samples){
  source(paste0("genebody_", s, ".geneBodyCoverage.r"))
  
  var_name <- paste0(s, "_markdup")
  coverage <- get(var_name)
  
  all_data <- rbind(all_data, data.frame(
    percentile = 1:100,
    coverage = coverage,
    sample = s
  ))
}

ggplot(all_data, aes(x = percentile, y = coverage, color = sample)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(title = "Gene Body Coverage",
       x = "Gene body percentile (5'->3')",
       y = "Coverage",
       color = "Sample")

ggsave("genebody_coverage_combined.png", width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)


```



```{r}
counts_raw <- read.delim('counts.tsv',
  sep = '\t',
  check.names = FALSE,
  skip = 1)

# ADD THIS LINE - set Geneid as rownames
rownames(counts_raw) <- counts_raw$Geneid

counts <- counts_raw[, (ncol(counts_raw)-5):ncol(counts_raw)]

colnames(counts) <- c("SRR11647686", "SRR11647689", "SRR11647692",
                      "SRR11647696", "SRR11647699", "SRR11647702")

metadata <- data.frame(
  row.names = colnames(counts),
  condition = factor(c("control", "control", "control",
                       "cancer", "cancer", "cancer"),
                     levels = c("control", "cancer"))
)

```

```{r}

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts,
  colData = metadata,
  design = ~ condition
)
dds$condition <- relevel(dds$condition, ref = 'control')

keep <- rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10
dds <- dds[keep, ]


cat("Genes remaining after low-count filter:", nrow(dds), "\n")
```

```{r}

dds <- DESeq(dds)

res <- results(dds,
  contrast = c('condition', 'cancer', 'control'),
  alpha = 0.05)
summary(res)


```

```{r}

resultsNames(dds)

# Then shrink
res_shrunk <- lfcShrink(dds,
                        coef = "condition_cancer_vs_control",
                        type = "apeglm")
res_shrunk <- res_shrunk[order(res_shrunk$padj), ]
summary(res_shrunk)
```

```{r}
res_df <- res_shrunk %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange >  1 ~ "Up",
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -1 ~ "Down",
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    ),
    significance = factor(significance, levels = c("Up", "Down", "NS"))
  )
head(res_df$gene)
```

```{r}

# Add gene annotations
res_df$gene_symbol <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
                              keys = res_df$gene,
                              column = "SYMBOL",
                              keytype = "ENSEMBL",
                              multiVals = "first")

res_df$gene_biotype <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
                               keys = res_df$gene,
                               column = "GENETYPE",
                               keytype = "ENSEMBL",
                               multiVals = "first")

# Count categories
table(res_df$significance)

```

```{r}
vst_all <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)

# Save normalized counts
vst_matrix <- assay(vst_all)
write.csv(vst_matrix, "normalized_counts_VST.csv")

```

pca

```{r}
pca_data <- plotPCA(vst_all, intgroup = "condition", returnData = TRUE)
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))

ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = condition, label = name)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "control" = "#bcbd22",
    "cancer"  = "#e89eb8"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(title = "PCA - Cancer vs Control",
       x = paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance"),
       y = paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance"),
       color = "Condition")

ggsave("pca_plot.png", width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300)

```

heatmap

```{r}
vst_mat <- assay(vst_all)
cor_mat <- cor(vst_mat, method = "pearson")

# Annotation for the heatmap
anno_df <- data.frame(
  condition = metadata$condition,
  row.names = rownames(metadata)
)

# Color palette
anno_colors <- list(
  condition = c(
    control = "#bcbd22",
    cancer  = "#e89eb8"
  )
)

pheatmap(
  cor_mat,
  annotation_col = anno_df,
  annotation_row = anno_df,
  annotation_colors = anno_colors,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "#332932"))(50),
  border_color = NA,
  main = "Sample-to-Sample Pearson Correlation",
  fontsize = 10,
  filename = "correlation_heatmap.png",
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

```

top genes

```{r}
top_genes <- res_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj)) %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(50) %>%
  pull(gene)

# Subset VST matrix to top genes
vst_subset <- vst_mat[top_genes, ]

# Z-score normalize by row (gene)
vst_z <- t(scale(t(vst_subset)))

# Annotation
anno_subset <- data.frame(
  condition = metadata$condition,
  row.names = rownames(metadata)
)

# Row annotation with gene symbols
row_anno <- data.frame(
  gene_symbol = res_df$gene_symbol[match(top_genes, res_df$gene)],
  row.names = top_genes
)

pheatmap(
  vst_z,
  annotation_col = anno_subset,
  annotation_colors = list(
    condition = c(control = "#7a7a18", cancer = "#b97e93")
  ),
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#003366", "white", "#722f37"))(50),
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  labels_row = res_df$gene_symbol[match(top_genes, res_df$gene)],
  fontsize_row = 8,
  border_color = NA,
  main = "Top 50 DE Genes — Cancer vs Control (Z-scored VST)",
  filename = "top50_heatmap.png",
  width = 10,
  height = 12
)

```

normalisation
```{r}
# ── 1. DEG LIST WITHOUT FC THRESHOLD ─────────────────────────
deg_all <- res_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05)

write.csv(deg_all, "DEGs_no_FC_threshold.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("DEGs without FC threshold:", nrow(deg_all), "\n")

# ── 2. DEG LIST WITH FC THRESHOLD ────────────────────────────
deg_fc <- res_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & abs(log2FoldChange) >= 1)

write.csv(deg_fc, "DEGs_FC_threshold.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("DEGs with FC threshold:", nrow(deg_fc), "\n")

# ── 3. GSEA RANKED LIST ───────────────────────────────────────
gsea_list <- res_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj) & !is.na(log2FoldChange)) %>%
  mutate(rank = -log10(padj) * sign(log2FoldChange)) %>%
  arrange(desc(rank)) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, gene_symbol, rank)

write.csv(gsea_list, "GSEA_ranked_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ── 4. VST NORMALIZED COUNTS ─────────────────────────────────
vst_df <- as.data.frame(vst_mat)
vst_df$gene_symbol <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
                              keys = rownames(vst_df),
                              column = "SYMBOL",
                              keytype = "ENSEMBL",
                              multiVals = "first")

write.csv(vst_df, "normalized_counts_VST.csv")
```

vulkanas

```{r}
top_genes <- res_df %>%
  filter(significance != "NS") %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(20)

ggplot(res_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = significance)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Up"   = "#b97e93",
    "Down" = "#7a7a18",
    "NS"   = "grey70"
  )) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes,
                  aes(label = gene_symbol),
                  size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot - Cancer vs Control",
       x = "log2 Fold Change",
       y = "-log10(adjusted p-value)",
       color = "Expression") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1))) +
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = max(-log10(res_df$padj), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95,
           label = paste0("Up: ", sum(res_df$significance == "Up")),
           color = "#b97e93", size = 4) +
  annotate("text", x = -3, y = max(-log10(res_df$padj), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95,
           label = paste0("Down: ", sum(res_df$significance == "Down")),
           color = "#7a7a18", size = 4)

ggsave("volcano_plot.png", width = 7, height = 4, dpi = 300)

```

MA

```{r}
# MA plot
ggplot(res_df, aes(x = log2(baseMean + 1), y = log2FoldChange, color = significance)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Up"   = "#b97e93",
    "Down" = "#7a7a18",
    "NS"   = "grey70"
  )) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1))) +
  labs(title = "MA Plot - Cancer vs Control",
       x = "log2 Mean Expression",
       y = "log2 Fold Change",
       color = "Expression")

ggsave("ma_plot.png", width = 7, height = 4, dpi = 300)

```



question 1

```{r}
# Total reads per sample
total_reads <- colSums(counts)
cat("Total reads per sample:\n")
print(total_reads)

# Number of detected genes (count > 0)
detected_genes <- colSums(counts > 0)
cat("\nDetected genes per sample:\n")
print(detected_genes)

```


p-vals

```{r}

# Plot raw vs adjusted p-values
p_df <- data.frame(
  pvalue = res_df$pvalue,
  padj = res_df$padj
) %>% filter(!is.na(pvalue) & !is.na(padj))

p1 <- ggplot(p_df, aes(x = pvalue)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "#7a7a18", color = "white") +
  theme_classic() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4000)) +
  labs(title = "Raw p-values", x = "p-value", y = "Count")

p2 <- ggplot(p_df, aes(x = padj)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "#b97e93", color = "white") +
  theme_classic() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4000)) +
  labs(title = "Adjusted p-values", x = "adjusted p-value", y = "Count")

combined <- arrangeGrob(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
ggsave("pvalue_comparison.png", combined, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```


comparison (4 q)
```{r}

sample_colors <- c(
  "SRR11647686" = "#e89eb8",
  "SRR11647689" = "#332932",
  "SRR11647692" = "#bb9999",
  "SRR11647696" = "#bcbd22",
  "SRR11647699" = "#efb7b5",
  "SRR11647702" = "#fcf7ed"
)

#raw
raw_long <- as.data.frame(counts) %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "Sample", values_to = "Count") %>%
  mutate(Count = log2(Count + 1))
  
p1 <- ggplot(raw_long, aes(x = Sample, y = Count, fill = Sample)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sample_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Raw Counts (log2)",
       x = "Sample", y = "log2(count + 1)")

# norm
# 
vst_long <- as.data.frame(vst_mat) %>%
  rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "Sample", values_to = "VST")
  
p2 <- ggplot(vst_long, aes(x = Sample, y = VST, fill = Sample)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sample_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "VST Normalized Counts",
       x = "Sample", y = "VST value")

combined <- arrangeGrob(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
ggsave("raw_vs_normalized.png", combined, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

BIOLOGICAL ANALYSIS

```{r}

sig_up   <- res_df %>% filter(significance == "Up")  %>% pull(gene)
sig_down <- res_df %>% filter(significance == "Down") %>% pull(gene)
sig_all  <- res_df %>% filter(significance != "NS")   %>% pull(gene)
```

gene symbols -> entrezid

```{r}
# Map Ensembl IDs to Entrez IDs
symbol_to_entrez <- bitr(
  sig_all,
  fromType = "ENSEMBL",
  toType   = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"),
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db)

cat("Mapped", nrow(symbol_to_entrez), "of", length(sig_all), "genes to Entrez IDs\n")
```


```{r}
# Create ranked list from res_df
gene_ranks <- res_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj) & !is.na(log2FoldChange)) %>%
  mutate(rank = -log10(padj) * sign(log2FoldChange)) %>%
  arrange(desc(rank)) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, rank) %>%
  deframe()  # converts to named vector

cat("Total genes in ranked list:", length(gene_ranks), "\n")

# Map Ensembl IDs to Entrez IDs
symbol_to_entrez <- bitr(
  names(gene_ranks),
  fromType = "ENSEMBL",
  toType   = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"),
  OrgDb    = org.Hs.eg.db
)

cat("Mapped", nrow(symbol_to_entrez), "of", length(gene_ranks), "genes to Entrez IDs\n")

# Ranked list with Entrez IDs (for KEGG GSEA)
ranked_entrez <- gene_ranks[symbol_to_entrez$ENSEMBL]
names(ranked_entrez) <- symbol_to_entrez$ENTREZID
ranked_entrez <- sort(ranked_entrez, decreasing = TRUE)
ranked_entrez <- ranked_entrez[!duplicated(names(ranked_entrez))]

# Ranked list with gene symbols (for MSigDB GSEA)
ranked_symbol <- gene_ranks[symbol_to_entrez$ENSEMBL]
names(ranked_symbol) <- symbol_to_entrez$SYMBOL
ranked_symbol <- sort(ranked_symbol, decreasing = TRUE)
ranked_symbol <- ranked_symbol[!duplicated(names(ranked_symbol))]

cat("Ranked entrez genes:", length(ranked_entrez), "\n")
cat("Ranked symbol genes:", length(ranked_symbol), "\n")
```

top genes

```{r}

# Top 3 upregulated
res_df %>%
  filter(significance == "Up") %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(5) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, gene_symbol, log2FoldChange, padj)

# Top 3 downregulated
res_df %>%
  filter(significance == "Down") %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  head(5) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, gene_symbol, log2FoldChange, padj)
```



2
Gene Ratio = (# of DEGs in a GO term) / (total # of DEGs you input)

```{r}

# Get background genes (all tested genes)
background_entrez <- bitr(
  res_df$gene,
  fromType = "ENSEMBL",
  toType = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
)$ENTREZID

# Get significant genes entrez IDs
sig_entrez <- symbol_to_entrez %>%
  filter(ENSEMBL %in% sig_all) %>%
  pull(ENTREZID)

# Run GO ORA for all terms (BP, MF, CC)
go_ora <- enrichGO(
  gene = sig_entrez,
  universe = background_entrez,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  ont = "ALL",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  readable = TRUE
)

cat("Enriched GO terms:", nrow(go_ora@result %>% filter(p.adjust < 0.05)), "\n")


dotplot(go_ora, 
        showCategory = 20,
        split = "ONTOLOGY") +
  facet_grid(ONTOLOGY ~ ., scales = "free") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  labs(title = "GO Over-representation Analysis")

ggsave("GO_ORA_all.png", width = 12, height = 15, dpi = 300)

```

GSEA

```{r}

gsea_go <- gseGO(
  geneList = ranked_entrez,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  ont = "BP",
  minGSSize = 15,
  maxGSSize = 500,
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  verbose = FALSE
)

# Plot
dotplot(gsea_go, showCategory = 20, split = ".sign") +
  facet_grid(. ~ .sign) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(title = "GSEA - GO Biological Process")
ggsave("GSEA_GO.png", width = 12, height = 17, dpi = 300)

# ── 2. GSEA OVER MSigDB ──────────────────────────────────────
# Download Hallmark gene sets
msig_hallmark <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "H") %>%
  dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)

gsea_msig <- GSEA(
  geneList = ranked_symbol,
  TERM2GENE = msig_hallmark,
  minGSSize = 15,
  maxGSSize = 500,
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  verbose = FALSE
)

# Plot
dotplot(gsea_msig, showCategory = 20, split = ".sign") +
  facet_grid(. ~ .sign) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(title = "GSEA - MSigDB Hallmark Gene Sets")
ggsave("GSEA_MSigDB.png", width = 12, height = 11, dpi = 300)

# ── 3. ENRICHMENT PLOT FOR TOP PATHWAY ───────────────────────
# Show enrichment plot for top GO term
gseaplot2(gsea_go, 
          geneSetID = 1:3,
          title = "Top 3 Enriched GO Pathways")
ggsave("GSEA_enrichment_plot.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}

library(enrichplot)

# GO GSEA map
gsea_go_2 <- pairwise_termsim(gsea_go)

emapplot(gsea_go_2, 
         showCategory = 30,
         layout = "nicely") +
  labs(title = "Enrichment Map - GO GSEA") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

ggsave("enrichment_map_GO.png", width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# MSigDB map
gsea_msig_2 <- pairwise_termsim(gsea_msig)

emapplot(gsea_msig_2,
         showCategory = 30,
         layout = "nicely") +
  labs(title = "Enrichment Map - MSigDB") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

ggsave("enrichment_map_MSigDB.png", width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

apear
```{r}
library(aPEAR)


enrichmentMap(gsea_go,
              n = 50,
              drawConnections = TRUE,
              fontSize = 3) +
  labs(title = "aPEAR Enrichment Map - GO GSEA") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

ggsave("aPEAR_GO.png", width = 14, height = 12, dpi = 300)

# ── APEAR MAP FOR MSIGDB GSEA ─────────────────────────────────
enrichmentMap(gsea_msig,
              n = 50,
              drawConnections = TRUE,
              fontSize = 3) +
  labs(title = "aPEAR Enrichment Map - MSigDB GSEA") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

ggsave("aPEAR_MSigDB.png", width = 14, height = 12, dpi = 300)

```
